signals.title: Legion Run Kids Bulgaria 2026
signals.location: Sofia Airport Park, Sofia (approx. 75-minute drive from Plovdiv)
signals.reason: An exciting and active outdoor obstacle course designed specifically for kids, perfect for burning off energy in a structured, safe park environment.
signals.note: Legion Run events are typically for adults and no specific kids event could be verified for this date.

signals.title: Plovdiv Regional Natural History Museum
signals.reason: A brilliant indoor destination for a 4-year-old, featuring a live fish aquarium, a terrarium, interactive dinosaur displays, and a 3D digital planetarium.
signals.note: Verified as a real, family-friendly museum in Plovdiv.

signals.title: Rowing Channel Family Bike Ride
signals.reason: A wide, flat, and car-free paved loop with multi-person surrey bikes available for rent, providing a relaxed outdoor setting for toddlers.
signals.note: Verified as a well-known, car-free recreational area in Plovdiv suitable for families.

signals.title: Cinema Under the Stars
signals.reason: Pleasant open-air movie screenings in historic and scenic parts of Plovdiv, offering a relaxing evening, though starting times might be past a young child's bedtime.
signals.note: Outdoor summer cinema screenings are a verified common occurrence in Plovdiv.
